query: INSERT INTO repo_stats (repo_id, original_size, compressed_size, deduplicated_size, total_chunks, unique_chunks, archive_count, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (repo_id) DO UPDATE SET original_size = EXCLUDED.original_size, compressed_size = EXCLUDED.compressed_size, deduplicated_size = EXCLUDED.deduplicated_size, total_chunks = EXCLUDED.total_chunks, unique_chunks = EXCLUDED.unique_chunks, archive_count = EXCLUDED.archive_count, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
